title: Gaytopia Server Pack
description: Server Resource Pack for the server mc.gaytopia.lgbt
body:
This pack is only for use on the server Gaytopia(mc.gaytopia.lgbt). It adds items and models along side base game content. It will not do much while not on Gaytopia.

Up to date credits can be found [here](https://wiki.gaytopia.lgbt/doku.php?id=server_resource_pack#credits)

If there is something in the pack you are interested in using, shoot me a PM on [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/ladyhaley/). I wont promise ill grant permission but I'm willing to hear you out.
